name: collapse-docs
description: Quickly collapse or uncollapse all docstrings and JSDoc comments via right-click menu.

editor/context.when: editorLangId == javascript || editorLangId == typescript || editorLangId == javascriptreact || editorLangId == typescriptreact || editorLangId == python || editorLangId == c || editorLangId == cpp || editorLangId == java || editorLangId == csharp || editorLangId == rust

keybindings.when: editorTextFocus && (editorLangId == javascript || editorLangId == typescript || editorLangId == javascriptreact || editorLangId == typescriptreact || editorLangId == python || editorLangId == c || editorLangId == cpp || editorLangId == java || editorLangId == csharp || editorLangId == rust)

collapseDocs.autoCollapseOnOpen.description: Automatically collapse documentation blocks the first time a supported file is opened.
